calendar.description: House Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This resolution urges federal assistance in stabilizing and restoring the Great Salt Lake.
hilighted_provisions: This resolution:<hr><ltbullet>discusses the importance of the Great Salt Lake to Utah's economy and residents and explains the lake's decline;<hr><ltbullet>addresses Utah's efforts in restoring the Great Salt Lake; and<hr><ltbullet>urges the federal government to provide assistance in stabilizing and restoring the Great Salt Lake.
